build_title: retatrutide longitudinal journey tracking, review scheduling and clinician handoff baseline
exact_commit_message: Add Certiaura Build 0045 retatrutide longitudinal journey tracking, review scheduling and clinician handoff baseline
capabilities: source-traceable clinician handoff JSON and Markdown
Project Genesis transactional import and rollback
release_controls: exact manifest and build-provenance validator scope

correction_history.root_cause: Raw seed events lacked event_id before append-time sorting
correction_history.correction: Normalise raw and enriched events before deterministic sort and hash-chain rebuild

correction_history.root_cause: Windows PowerShell 5.1 converted expected native stderr into a terminating NativeCommandError under ErrorActionPreference Stop
correction_history.correction: Temporarily use non-terminating native error handling, capture LASTEXITCODE, restore ErrorActionPreference and assert no rejected-output file exists
